rows.label: tev010901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Christopher for advice on how to overpower your foes.

rows.label: tev010901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Christopher about recent developments.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Christopher about Dolls.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Christopher about Doll combat.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Christopher about the device Lin is making.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Christopher about the Doll flight module.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Christopher about recent developments.

rows.label: tev010901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Christopher about recent developments.

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0001
rows.name:
When you're battling a nasty indigen,
the trick is to immobilize it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Stagger your target with a
well-timed combo, then topple
it with a special attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Once it's down, you can unleash
your most powerful attacks
with flawless accuracy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you're using a Doll, once you've staggered an
enemy, try binding it instead. This causes even
greater results than if you had merely toppled it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Not that that will matter much to you! They don't
just let any scrub off the street into the cockpit
of a Doll, you know? Thank goodness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0011
rows.name:
When you're battling a nasty indigen,
the trick is to immobilize it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Stagger your target with a
well-timed combo, then topple
it with a special attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Once it's down, you can unleash
your most powerful attacks
with flawless accuracy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you're using a Doll, once you've staggered an
enemy, try binding it instead. This causes even
greater results than if you had merely toppled it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Of course, I'm one of relatively few BLADEs who has
been proven worthy to pilot a Doll. What a delight it
would be to have a lady as lovely as yourself join me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0021
rows.name:
A fine question. And I am just the
man to answer it, as I have already
purchased the Doll of my dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0022
rows.name:
And I'm not talking about one of
those hideous, soulless hunks of
steel BLADE issues to common grunts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0023
rows.name:
My beloved Aphrodite is a work of art, so beautifully
and lavishly customized as to be in a league of
her own so far as BLADE Dolls are concerned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0024
rows.name:
All of her components have been custom-ordered from
the finest engineers in the business. They cost a pretty
penny, but I spare no expense on the ones I love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0025
rows.name:
When I see the way the light
sparkles off Aphrodite's chassis,
I know I've done right by her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Now if you'll excuse me, I am off to trek
across Mira in Aphrodite's tender bosom,
eradicating vile potamuses all the while![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0034
rows.name:
What? Seriously? What kind of
self-respecting man doesn't have
a Doll license of his own?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0035
rows.name:
Do you think any woman in NLA
is going to look at you twice
if you don't have a Doll?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0036
rows.name:
Why don't you man up and go ask
Commander Vandham if you can take
the licensing test already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0037
rows.name:
Then again, I don't know how much getting
a license would help the likes of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0038
rows.name:
Women love me because everything
I am and do is a work of art.
You, on the other hand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0041
rows.name:
My dearest flower, am I to
understand that you do not
yet possess a Doll license?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0042
rows.name:
Perhaps you should go speak to
Commander Vandham and ask him to
let you take the licensing test.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0043
rows.name:
Dear me, what's this? The way you
gaze upon me... Have you fallen
head over heels for me already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0044
rows.name:
While I could give you a great many
things, I'm afraid that my Doll license
is not among them. Forgive me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0052
rows.name:
As a veteran Doll pilot, allow me to share
some advice on how to comport yourself
with proper grace upon the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0053
rows.name:
You'll earn little experience
from battling foes that are
smaller than your Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0054
rows.name:
If you wish to polish your own fighting skills,
you should exit your Doll and do battle on
foot. It is the far more efficient way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0055
rows.name:
In other words, there is no poetry
in tormenting a smaller foe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0056
rows.name:
As a fellow man, I expect to see you engaging
in fair fights on the ground, not sullying
your Doll with uncouth bullying of the weak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0059
rows.name:
As a veteran Doll pilot, allow me to share
some advice on how to comport yourself
with proper grace upon the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0060
rows.name:
You'll earn little experience
from battling foes that are
smaller than your Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0061
rows.name:
If you wish to polish your own fighting skills,
you should exit your Doll and do battle on
foot. It is the far more efficient way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0062
rows.name:
In other words, there is no poetry
in tormenting a smaller foe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0063
rows.name:
It would wound me deeply to see a lady as lovely
as you sully her Doll with uncouth bullying, rather
than engaging in fair fights on the ground.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1001
rows.name:
I continue to customize my
beloved Aphrodite with all the
love and coin I can spare.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1002
rows.name:
The way she shines in combat now? Ha
ha! She is many times the machine she
was when I first purchased her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1003
rows.name:
I hope that you, too, will refuse to be
satisfied merely with owning a Doll, and
will customize yours for far greater things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1004
rows.name:
And when you do, we shall take our
Dolls out together and eradicate the
Overeds that infect this world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1009
rows.name:
To see our Dolls taking flight like angels
of heaven... What a poetic stroke of
inspiration has struck our young Lin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1010
rows.name:
Ah, but what would an ignorant savage
like yourself understand of such poetry?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1011
rows.name:
I understand that Commander Vandham
is recruiting test pilots for our
new flying Dolls via Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1012
rows.name:
If you're interested enough in the topic
to discuss it with me, perhaps you should
consider accepting the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1017
rows.name:
To see our Dolls taking flight like angels
of heaven... Such a poetic stroke of
inspiration could only strike a woman![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1018
rows.name:
As a person of the female persuasion
yourself, I'm sure you're able to appreciate
the poetry of what Lin has accomplished?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1019
rows.name:
I understand that Commander Vandham
is recruiting test pilots for our
new flying Dolls via Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1020
rows.name:
If you're interested enough in the topic
to discuss it with me, perhaps you should
consider accepting the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1025
rows.name:
Needless to say, I had my beloved
Aphrodite upgraded with a Doll
flight module immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1026
rows.name:
Seeing her gliding through the sky,
unencumbered by the bonds of the surface
world—what a goddess she has become![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1027
rows.name:
I must find a way to express the depth
of my gratitude to the engineering
team that made this feat possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG1028
rows.name:
Let us flap our steel wings and
soar through the skies together—for
now we BLADEs know true freedom![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0064
rows.name:
The goddess of beauty has sent me a
goddess of love from the heavens above.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0065
rows.name:
She brought me the final parts
I needed for my beloved Aphrodite.
This is clearly destiny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0066
rows.name:
Oh, how I love you, Dana!
You are my true Aphrodite![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0067
rows.name:
Thank you, goddess of beauty!
I will love her for all time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0068
rows.name:
You, listen to me! I have been
the victim of a cruel prank
played by that woman, Dana![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0069
rows.name:
I opened what I had been told would be a
love letter from her, but out of the
envelope popped two red thallus antennae![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0070
rows.name:
The mere memory brings the bile to my throat!
Why would that woman do such a thing? Is she
a demon in the service of Beelzebub?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0071
rows.name:
And here I thought the gods had
created all women to love me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010901_MSG0072
rows.name:
Well then. Apparently even
the gods make mistakes.[ST:wait ]
